citations.claim: The component reads a fixed attestation file and delegates verification to the coordinator's attestation package, outputting human-readable results with appropriate exit codes
File read errors are handled with stderr output and exit code 1
JSON parsing uses attestation.VerifyJSON() and handles errors with exit code 1
Hardware information is extracted and displayed including chip name and hardware model
Verification results are output with success message for valid attestations or failure message with exit code 1 for invalid ones
The component depends on the coordinator's attestation package for core verification functionality
The component demonstrates cross-language verification between Swift Secure Enclave and Go coordinator implementations
VerifyJSON function parses attestation JSON and delegates to core verification logic
The Verify function performs comprehensive P-256 ECDSA signature validation and security requirement checks
VerificationResult structure contains hardware info, security status, and validation outcomes used by the CLI output
